title: adromischus cristatus var. zeyheri
intro: Adromischus cristatus var. zeyheri, also known as the 'Christmas Cactus of the Kalahari', is a succulent plant that belongs to the family Aizoaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from respiratory issues, among others. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves or stems of Adromischus cristatus var. zeyheri can be crushed or dried to be used in teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
